zh.lifeSummary: 當Muria Chisholm of Chisholm於1407年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾武爾哈特時，她的父親Sir John de Chisholm 7th of Chisholm32歲，母親Catherine Bisset of Bisset27歲。她於1433年與Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1474年在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪享年67歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Muria Chisholm of Chisholm于1407年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾武爾哈特时，她的父亲Sir John de Chisholm 7th of Chisholm32岁，母亲Catherine Bisset of Bisset27岁。她于1433年与Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1474年在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪享年67岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰洛-爾。

nameMeanings.name: Chisholm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Chisholme near Hawick in southern Scotland, which derives its name from Old English c̄se, cēse ‘cheese’ (from Latin caseus) + holm ‘piece of dry land in a fen’ and refers to a waterside meadow good for dairy farming and hence for producing cheeses. In the 14th century members of this family migrated to the Highlands, settling in Strathglass, where their name was Gaelicized as Siosal.

variants.name: Chisom
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of   Chisholm  , once common in Yorkshire but now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chisam
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of   Chisholm  , once common in Cumbria but now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chisum
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of   Chisholm  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chislom
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Chisholm   or   Chisolm  .

variants.name: Chezem
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Chisholm  . Compare   Chisum  .

nameMeanings.name: Muria
meanings: A name derived from Mapia, one of the Greek forms of Miriam. Maria is found as a male name as well as a female name. Viscount Montague, of Cowdray, Sussex, who succeeded to the title as second viscount, was christened Anthony Maria Browne. In Camden's Remains (p. 44), referred to in Delicie Literarise, occurs Thomas Maria Wingfield; and there was also a Sir Edward Maria Wingfield. The name appears to have been adopted in the latter family from Mary, daughter of Henry VIII. Compare Notes and Queries 5th S. ii. 73, 316, 478. Marie is frequently found as a male name in France and in other parts of the Continent.

en.lifeSummary: When Muria Chisholm of Chisholm was born in 1407, in Urquhart, Inverness-shire, Scotland, her father, Sir John de Chisholm 7th of Chisholm, was 32 and her mother, Catherine Bisset of Bisset, was 27. She married Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus in 1433. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1474, in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, at the age of 67, and was buried in Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Muria Chisholm of Chisholm est née en 1407, à Urquhart, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Sir John de Chisholm 7th of Chisholm, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Catherine Bisset of Bisset, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus en 1433. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1474, à Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Muria Chisholm of Chisholm 1407 in Urquhart, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Chisholm 7th of Chisholm 32 und ihre Mutter Catherine Bisset of Bisset 27. Sie hat 1433 Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1474 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland und wurde in Ross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Muria Chisholm of Chisholm è nata il nel 1407 nel Urquhart, Inverness-shire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John de Chisholm 7th of Chisholm, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Catherine Bisset of Bisset, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus nel 1433. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1474, nel Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Ross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Muria Chisholm of Chisholmが1407年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアウルクハートで生まれた時，父Sir John de Chisholm 7th of Chisholmは32歳，母Catherine Bisset of Bissetは27歳であった。1433年にAlexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1474年にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアクロマルトイで67歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Muria Chisholm of Chisholm(이)가 1407년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 르크하트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Chisholm 7th of Chisholm(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Bisset of Bisset(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1433년 Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1474년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르 크로마티에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Muria Chisholm of Chisholm nasceu em 1407, em Urquhart, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John de Chisholm 7th of Chisholm, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Bisset of Bisset, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus em 1433. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1474, em Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Ross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Muria Chisholm of Chisholm родилась в 1407 г. в местности уркухарт, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Chisholm 7th of Chisholm было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Bisset of Bisset, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus в 1433 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1474 г. в местности кромерти, кромертишир, Шотландия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Muria Chisholm of Chisholm nació en 1407, en Urquhart, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John de Chisholm 7th of Chisholm, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Catherine Bisset of Bisset, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Alexander-mac-Henry Sutherland 3rd of Duffus en 1433. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1474, en Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Ross-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
